calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause Re Contempt
Off Calendar Dec-02-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DENNIS F. MURPHY OF THE SEDGWICK LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-781-7900 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Order To Show Cause Re Contempt - The stipulated request to vacate this hearing is denied. It was received long after the court spent significant resources on this matter. In the future any requests by Dr. Leeman or his counsel to take off calendar matters that they put on calendar must be made at least three court days before the hearing. Dr. Leeman's application for an order to show cause re contempt is denied. All requests for fees and costs are denied. Section 10 of the Consent Judgment is reasonably susceptible to the construction proffered by Big Lots. Contempt is an extraordinary remedy which should only be used in a clear case of an intentional violation of a court order. No such clarity exists here. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/hk
